title: GET READY - 60s/70s Motown, Soul & Disco
subtitle: Sunday Matinee Special
description: GET READY Northampton вҖ” four hours of legendary 60s/70s Motown, Soul & Disco floorfillers. Banish the January blues!
fullDescription:
Remember when music made you MOVE? When every song on the radio had that irresistible groove that got your feet tapping before you even knew it?

GET READY takes you back to the golden era of Motown, Soul and Disco вҖ” four hours of the biggest floorfillers from the 60s and 70s. The songs that defined a generation, played loud, with people who feel exactly the same way.

This Sunday matinee is your antidote to the January blues. No dark nights, no late finishes вҖ” just pure, joyful dancing from 2pm to 6pm. Home in time for dinner, buzzing for the rest of the week.
highlights: рҹ”Ҙ Last 50 Tickets: Just ВЈ7.50 each вҖ” grab yours before they're gone!|вҳҖпёҸ This Sunday: 2pm-6pm вҖ” banish those January blues and be home for dinner. All the fun, none of the late-night fatigue|рҹҺө Legendary Floorfillers: The Jacksons, Stevie Wonder, Chic, Diana Ross, James Brown and more вҖ” every song a certified classic|рҹҸҶ Boombastic Quality: From the team that's been selling out events for 10+ years. We know how to throw a party
soundtrack: The Jacksons В· Al Wilson В· Stevie Wonder В· The Four Tops В· Rick James В· Chic В· Sister Sledge В· The Temptations В· James Brown В· Diana Ross В· The Supremes В· The Marvelettes В· Martha Reeves В· Ray Charles В· Aretha Franklin В· Marvin Gaye

title: THE 2PM CLUB Luton вҖ” 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
subtitle: Your best night out, right in the middle of the afternoon. 4 hours of 80s, 90s & 00s anthems. Home by 7-ish. Let your hair down. Properly!
description: THE 2PM CLUB Luton вҖ” 4 hours of iconic 80s, 90s & 00s anthems. All the fun of a proper night out, home by 7-ish.
fullDescription:
LET YOUR HAIR DOWN. PROPERLY

Remember when going OUT OUT didn't require a week's recovery? When you could sing every word, lose your voice, and still feel human the next day?

The 2PM Club is the night out that never gets cancelled. No more 47-message group chats. No more "maybe next time." Everyone says yes to this one.
highlights: рҹҺӨ ICONIC ANTHEMS. NONSTOP ENERGY: Wall-to-wall 80s, 90s and 00s. Belting out lyrics with other people who know every word too. That moment when the whole room feels like family вҖ“ that's what you're booking.|рҹ•ә DAYTIME PARTY, NIGHT-OUT VIBES: Same Boombastic team, Club-level production and confetti moments вҖ“ just at people-friendly hours. title: FAMILY SILENT DISCO Northampton
subtitle: Dance together, find your vibe!
description: FAMILY SILENT DISCO Northampton вҖ” Dance together while everyone finds their perfect vibe! Three channels of family-friendly fun.
fullDescription:
Have you ever tried dancing like nobody's watching... with headphones?

At our Family Silent Disco, everyone gets their own soundtrack while sharing the same dance floor! Kids can bounce to Party Hits, Teens to Charts/Trending while Parents groove to 80s/90s/00s favourites - all in the same space without compromising on music choices!

Perfect for kids 4+ and parents get to join the party too (in fact, the parents regularly enjoy it even more!). Three channels means everyone in the family finds their perfect music vibe.

We carefully curate all three family-friendly channels, drawing from our experience hosting both adult decades parties with Boombastic and school sessions through The Silent Disco Project.
highlights: рҹҺ§ THREE CHANNELS: Blue Party, Red Throwback, Green Chart вҖ“ everyone finds their groove|рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§вҖҚрҹ‘Ұ AGES 4+: Kids love it, parents often enjoy it even more!|рҹ”Җ SWITCH ANYTIME: Flip between channels whenever you fancy a change|рҹҺү DOORS 1:30PM: Party channel playing as you arrive, full experience 2-4pm

channels.name: PARTY
channels.artists: Disney Hits, Trolls, Moana, Baby Shark, YMCA, Can't Stop The Feeling

channels.name: THROWBACK
channels.artists: Mr Brightside, Dancing Queen, Wannabe, Spice Girls, Take That

channels.name: CHART
channels.artists: Sabrina Carpenter, Dua Lipa, Harry Styles, Clean Chart & Trending

title: FOOTLOOSE 80s Northampton
subtitle: Your favourite 80s night is back вҖ” and it's almost gone. Final 15 tickets remaining.
description: FOOTLOOSE 80s Northampton is almost sold out вҖ” just 15 tickets left for four hours of non-stop 80s anthems.
fullDescription:
вҡ пёҸ This show is nearly gone. Just 15 tickets remain for FOOTLOOSE 80s Northampton вҖ” once they're gone, they're gone.

Remember pressing record on your tape deck during the Top of the Pops countdown? Blasting Madonna's "Like a Prayer" through your headphones? Belting out Bon Jovi in your first car?

FOOTLOOSE 80s is your ticket back to those moments - four hours of non-stop anthems from the greatest decade in music. The songs you know every word to, played loud, with people who feel exactly the same way.

This isn't just any 80s night. This is the real deal - a proper party where the dancefloor is full, the singalongs are epic, and the vibe is electric.
highlights: рҹҺ§ Wall-to-wall 80s anthems: Four hours, no filler - just hit after hit|рҹ“ә Giant screens: Authentic 80s videos - cheer when your favourites appear|рҹҺү Confetti & inflatables: Let loose with confetti cannons and inflatable mic moments|рҹ•ә Dress your way: Bright, bold or casual - come as you like, but be ready to dance
soundtrack: Madonna В· Queen В· Wham! В· Bon Jovi В· Whitney Houston В· A-ha В· Duran Duran В· Michael Jackson В· Cyndi Lauper В· Prince В· Eurythmics В· Rick Astley В· Spandau Ballet В· Depeche Mode В· Def Leppard В· The Human League В· Culture Club В· Tears For Fears В· Simple Minds
checkoutMessage: Only 15 tickets left вҖ” grab yours before they're gone рҹ‘Ү

title: SILENT DISCO GREATEST HITS IS 10!
subtitle: 10th Anniversary Celebration
description:
Ten years of the most popular silent disco in the region! Join us for a very special celebration of a decade of legendary nights filled with friends, party tunes, and epic headphone moments.

3 DJs play 4 hours of the biggest hits!

рҹ”ө POP вҖ“ Taylor Swift, ABBA & BeyoncГ© рҹ’ғ
рҹҹў INDIE вҖ“ Arctic Monkeys, The Killers & Oasis рҹҺё
рҹ”ҙ DANCE вҖ“ Calvin Harris, Faithless & Robin S рҹ”Ҡ

Switch whenever you want вҖ“ your headphones, your rules! рҹ’¬ Perfect for birthdays, reunions, or an unforgettable catch-up!
fullDescription:
Ten years of the most popular silent disco in the region!

Join us for a very special celebration of a decade of legendary nights filled with friends, party tunes, and epic headphone moments.

3 DJs play 4 hours of the biggest hits вҖ“ pick your vibe or switch it up! Your choice!
highlights: рҹҺӨ SING LIKE NOBODY'S LISTENING: Because they're not. They're too busy doing exactly the same thing. You'll be screaming Mr Brightside while your mate's lost in Show Me Love.|рҹ‘Ҝ THE NIGHT OUT WHERE EVERYONE WINS: No more arguing about music. No more splitting up to find different rooms. The pop fan, the indie kid, and the dance head - all on the same floor, all having the time of their lives. Switch whenever you want. Your headphones, your rules.|рҹӨЈ THE HEADPHONES-OFF MOMENT: Take them off for five seconds. Shuffling feet. Muffled singing. Someone shouting "THIS SONG!" before slamming their headphones back on. Three different songs happening at once. It's hilarious. It's brilliant.|рҹҸҶ TEN YEARS. STILL GOING STRONG: The most popular silent disco in the region for a decade. Created by Boombastic Events - the team behind 10+ years of sold-out events across the Midlands.

title: THE 2PM CLUB Northampton вҖ” 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
subtitle: Your best night out, right in the middle of the afternoon. 4 hours of 80s, 90s & 00s anthems. Home by 7-ish. Let your hair down. Properly!
description: THE 2PM CLUB Northampton вҖ” 4 hours of iconic 80s, 90s & 00s anthems at Franklin's Gardens. All the fun of a proper night out!
fullDescription:
LET YOUR HAIR DOWN. WITHOUT THE NEXT-DAY REGRETS вңЁ

Remember when going OUT OUT didn't require a week's recovery? When you could sing every word, lose your voice, and still feel human the next day?

We've found the way to make that happen once more!

After our sellout visit in October, we're back at the home of Northampton Saints for an afternoon of iconic 80s 90s and 00s anthems!

4 hours of the biggest hairbrush hits and sing-alongs, with night out energy, confetti moments, and a room full of people who know every word too.
highlights: рҹҺӨ ICONIC ANTHEMS. NONSTOP ENERGY: Wall-to-wall classics from Wham! to Whitney, Bon Jovi to BeyoncГ©. You WILL do the moves. You WILL lose your voice. You WILL text each other about it for weeks.|рҹ•ә DAYTIME PARTY, NIGHT-OUT VIBES: Same Boombastic team. Club-level production, massive screens, dazzling lights, and confetti explosions - just at people-friendly hours. Dance freely, laugh loudly, and still be home by 7pm.|рҹ‘Ҝ FINALLY, A PLAN NOBODY BAILS ON: This is the plan that will escape the group chat. Four hours where everyone actually makes it - no babysitter dramas, no late-night worries. Adulting can wait.|рҹҳҺ ALL THE FUN. STILL BUZZING BY WEDNESDAY: Last time, you walked out saying "Let's do it again!" This is the time to do it. This is your plan.|рҹҸҶ TRUST THE LEGACY: Created by Boombastic Events - 10+ years of consistent sell-outs across the Midlands, including previous smash-hit events right here at Franklin's Gardens.
